subcodes.first_line: O pure souls! The purity of spirit and radiance of heart lie in the love of God. Praise be to God that ye have received your portion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جانهای پاک پاکی جان و تابناکی دل بمحبت یزدانست الحمد لله که شما بهره و نصیب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
